KeyDeck Proof 0.17 — Second Real Provider Evidence Capture

This validator contains the normalized, non-secret Aerolink HTTP 401 invalid-key and HTTP 402 included-usage-window-limit evidence.

It proves that both exact behaviors can coexist for the same provider endpoint and that the HTTP 402 remains conservative until key/account scope is proven.

No API key, paid provider, network, ChatGPT login, Codex login, or Aerolink account is required.

Run:
  .\KeyDeck-Proof-0.17.exe
